data.chapter_title_en: What a Muslim should say when he is praised
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تُؤَاخِذْنِي بِمَا يَقُولُونَ، وَاغْفِرْ لِي مَا لاَ يَعْلَمُونَ، [وَاجْعَلْنِي خَيْراً مِمَّا يَظُّنُّونَ])).
data.english_text: O Allah, do not call me to account for what they say and forgive me for what they have no knowledge of [and make me better than they imagine].

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: Allaahumma laa tu'aakhithnee bimaa yaqooloona, waghfir lee maa laa ya'lamoona [waj'alnee khayram-mimmaa yadhunnoon]
